scripture.title: Psalm 32:8
scripture.body_text: I will instruct you and teach you in the way which you shall go. I will counsel you with my eye on you.

scripture.title: Isaiah 30:21
scripture.body_text: When you turn to the right hand and when you turn to the left, your ears will hear a voice behind you, saying, “This is the way. Walk in it.”

scripture.title: Proverbs 3:5-6
scripture.body_text: Trust in Yahweh with all your heart, and don’t lean on your own understanding. In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.

prayer.title: Prayer to Hear God’s Leading
prayer.body_text: Lord, help me hear Your voice behind me saying, “This is the way, walk in it.” Make me attentive to Your leading and willing to follow where You direct. Guard me from wandering, and guide my steps in Your way.

reflection.title: This Is the Way
reflection.body_text:
When you are unsure which way to go, this verse offers reassurance: God is not silent or absent from your need for direction.

He is able to guide His people and to make the way clear. His leadership is personal and purposeful.

You can ask Him to direct your steps and trust that He knows how to lead you in the path you should take.
